steps.title: Text Stream Portal live scenario
steps.expected_visual: operator follows JSON step transcript

steps.title: Scene display area resolved
steps.action: use live scene dimensions for portal placement and drag bounds
steps.expected_visual: portal can be dragged across the full HUD surface

steps.title: Portal size resolved
steps.action: scale portal defaults from live scene dimensions unless explicit size overrides were provided
steps.expected_visual: portal occupies a readable portion of the detected display

steps.title: Baseline render
steps.action: publish full portal chrome + transcript viewport
steps.expected_visual: portal surface appears at right edge with header, body, footer

steps.title: Baseline render
steps.expected_visual: portal surface visible; body text readable

steps.title: Output scroll contract
steps.action: mount long output, register scroll, step offset, append tail, return
steps.expected_visual: OUTPUT pane scrolls through bounded transcript data, then returns to latest lines

steps.title: Mount long output
steps.action: registered vertical scroll config and mounted bounded output
steps.expected_visual: OUTPUT pane shows first transcript window within portal bounds

steps.title: Scroll output window
steps.expected_visual: OUTPUT pane advances through transcript while chrome remains readable

steps.expected_visual: visible output window does not jump to the tail

steps.title: Composer caret smoke
steps.action: render hello-world and long-paste composer states with visible caret
steps.expected_visual: caret aligns with text after Space and wrapped markdown paste

steps.title: Composer hello world rendered
steps.action: rendered normal typing target with Space between words
steps.expected_visual: hello world appears once, caret after the final d

steps.title: Composer long paste rendered
steps.action: rendered wrapped markdown-like paste with caret at end
steps.expected_visual: caret remains on the final wrapped row without a one-character lag at line ends

steps.title: Text Stream Portal scenario complete
steps.action: review transcript and capture UX notes
steps.expected_visual: portal visible until cleanup releases the lease

steps.title: Portal lease released
steps.action: release the lease before closing the session
steps.expected_visual: all portal tiles are removed from the HUD
